zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Archibald Douglas 3rd Lord of Cavers於大約1424年出生在蘇格蘭洛包爾卡維斯 豪斯時，他的父親William Douglas 2nd Lord of Cavers30歲，母親Margaret Stewart25歲。他於大約1460年與Mary Herries在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾洛包結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1486年4月8日在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾卡維斯享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Archibald Douglas 3rd Lord of Cavers于大约1424年出生在苏格兰洛包爾卡維斯 豪斯时，他的父亲William Douglas 2nd Lord of Cavers30岁，母亲Margaret Stewart25岁。他于大约1460年与Mary Herries在英国苏格兰洛包爾洛包结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1486年4月8日在英国苏格兰洛包爾卡維斯享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Archibald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

variants.name: Archibold
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Archibald Douglas 3rd Lord of Cavers was born about 1424, in Cavers House, Roxburghshire, Scotland, his father, William Douglas 2nd Lord of Cavers, was 30 and his mother, Margaret Stewart, was 25. He married Mary Herries about 1460, in Roxburgh, Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 8 April 1486, in Cavers, Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Archibald Douglas 3rd Lord of Cavers est né environ 1424, à Cavers House, Roxburghshire, Écosse, son père, William Douglas 2nd Lord of Cavers, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret Stewart, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Mary Herries environ 1460, à Roxburgh, Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 avril 1486, à Cavers, Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Archibald Douglas 3rd Lord of Caversが約1424年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアカバーズ ホーウゼで生まれた時，父William Douglas 2nd Lord of Caversは30歳，母Margaret Stewartは25歳であった。約1460年にイギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアロクスブルグでMary Herriesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1486年4月8日にイギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアカバーズで63歳で死去した。

ko.Atholl, Angus, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스 앳홀
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Archibald Douglas 3rd Lord of Cavers(이)가 대략 1424년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 카버스 허스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Douglas 2nd Lord of Cavers(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Stewart(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1460년 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르 록스버그에서 Mary Herries(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1486년 4월 8일 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르 카버스에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Mary Herries aproximadamente 1460, em Roxburgh, Roxburghshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Atholl, Angus, Scotland: атолл, пирт анд кинросс, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Archibald Douglas 3rd Lord of Cavers родился около 1424 г. в местности кавирс хоус, роксбургшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William Douglas 2nd Lord of Cavers было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Stewart, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Herries около 1460 г. в местности роксбург, роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 апреля 1486 г. в местности кавирс, роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.

Se casó con Mary Herries aproximadamente 1460, en Roxburgh, Roxburghshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas.
